heading: Renumbered § 4702]
label: 2409a Renumbered § 4702]
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 2409a, added , , ; amended , (k)(2), , , 117, which required promulgation of regulations prohibiting defense contractor from discharging or discriminating against employee for disclosing to Government official information concerning contract between contractor and Department of Defense evidencing violation of Federal law or regulation and providing certain complaint and investigation provisions and provided procedures for review and enforcement, was repealed by , , . For effective date and applicability of repeal, see , set out as an Effective Date of 1994 Amendment note under .Pub. L. 101–510, div. A, title VIII, § 837(a)(1)104 Stat. 1616Pub.
